subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One testifieth even as God did testify before the creation of heaven and earth that there is none other God but I, the All-Subduing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم بما شهد الله قبل خلق السموات و الارض انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
